rulings.Case Title: MARY AMEN VS. EDWARD ROGERS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Represent Aive Of Est A Te For Deceased Defendant [Edward Rogers] (C.C.P. 377.41)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 1. PLAINTIFF MARY AMEN Notice Of Motion And Motion To Substitute Representative Of Estate For Deceased Defendant [Edward Rogers] (C.C.P. 377.41) GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: PYRAMID DESIGN(SERIES D) LLC ET AL VS. GERALD R. LOWE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF PYRAMID DESIGN(SERIES D) LLC, KLAUS BURMEISTER Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To File First Amended Complaint DENIED. Moving party unreasonably delayed in bringing this motion both before and after the new counsel substituted in. Additionally, filing of the amended complaint is prejudicial to Defendants in light of defendants' pending motion for summary judgment and the trial date on January 11, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TYRONE YOUNGS VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY ET AL (PROVIDED ACCESS)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice To Correct Mistake By Plaintiff
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 11. PLAINTIFF TYRONE YOUNGS Notice To Correct Mistake By Plaintiff OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. Also, this request is moot order sustaining the demurrer with leave to amend entered on November 10, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KURT LESSWING VS. COURTNEY SEASHOLS **(regular civil case)**
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT COURTNEY SEASHOLS MOTION TO STRIKE 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to December 3, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of opposition to department 501 no later than November 20, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BURTON JANG VS. CHRIS CALHOUN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT CHRIS CALHOUN Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED. Notice is not fatally defective because the amount of rent demanded is not excessive. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELITE INVESTMENT & CAPITAL GROUP, INC. VS. KATHRYN HARDAWAY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memo Of P&A, And Declaration Iso Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT KATHRYN HARDAWAY Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment DENIED, moving party fails to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC VS. CARLOS NAVARRO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 8. DEFENDANT CARLOS NAVARRO DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to clearly allege the nature of the rental agreement between the parties. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VLADISLAV CHERNOGUZ VS. WILLIAM F CONDON ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 9. DEFENDANT WILLIAM WILLIS, WILLIAM CONDON MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS DENIED, 5 days to respond. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and the Court has jurisdiction. Determination of the factual issue such as waiver is not appropriate at this stage of the litigation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 10. rulings.Case Title: A-1 PROPERTY MANAGEMENT & INVESTMENTS VS. RAPHAEL M. GOINS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday November 16, 2015, line 12. DEFENDANT RAPHAEL GOINS AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to reconcile allegations in paragraph 7(e), Ex.2 and argument in opposition (5:4-28). Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)
